title: leucanthemum virgatum
intro: Leucanthemum virgatum, also known as the upright white daisy, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its white flowers and narrow leaves. The medicinal properties of Leucanthemum virgatum include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe skin irritations. Leucanthemum virgatum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
